productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Checks Grey Shirt
description: Composition Black and grey check shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a spread collar, buttoned front placket, two patch pockets with button closures, embroidered branding on the left chest and a curved hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash dark colours separately Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not wring or bleach Warm iron Bring the zing back to semi-formal wear with this US Polo shirt. The cotton fabric ensures optimal comfort and the stylish design earns a definite fashion accolade. Pair it with formal trousers, classy accessories and leather shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6'1" and shoulders 18.5"
